content.query:
CREATE VIEW v_Manufacturing_All
-- drop view v_Manufacturing_All
as
SELECT      MFNO as     [Manufacturing Number]
,           WHST as     [Order Status]
,           WHLO as     [Warehouse]
,           ITNO as     [Item Number]
,           IM.Description as [Description]
,           STDT as     [Start Date]
,           RPDT as     [Report Date]
,           ORQA as     [Order Qty]
,           RVQA as     [Received Qty]
,           CASE WHEN WCLN in ('ALINE', 'BEVLINE', 'BLINE', 'CLINE', 'EXC10LIN', 'WMLINE') THEN 'Assembly'
            WHEN WCLN in ('ZEROLLFG', 'ZEROLLIP') THEN 'Zeroll'
            WHEN WCLN IN ('PLATING') then 'Plating'
            WHEN WCLN IN ('MOLDING') then 'Molding'
            else WCLN end as [Production Line]
FROM        M3.MWOHED MW
LEFT JOIN   BI_ItemMaster IM on MW.ITNO = IM.[Item Number]
WHERE       ORTY IN ('D95', 'D96')
